---
title: "Transformation digitale et performance boursiere Modelisation econometriques"
author: "BOUKHIT KHALID"
output: 
  html_document: 
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


<!-- Exploratory Data Analysis -->
```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr); library(FactoMineR); library(ggplot2); library(dplyr)
  library(plm); library(scales); library(viridis); library(tidyr)
})

# --- Load Data ---------------------------------------------------------------
TP <- read_csv(file.choose())
TP$Secteur <- as.factor(TP$Secteur)
TP$year <- as.factor(TP$year)

# --- Dataset Overview --------------------------------------------------------
cat("Dataset dimensions:", nrow(TP), "rows x", ncol(TP), "columns\n")
cat("Unique companies:", length(unique(TP$id)), "\n")
cat("Years:", paste(sort(unique(TP$year)), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Sectors:", nlevels(TP$Secteur), "\n\n")

# --- Sector Distribution -----------------------------------------------------
g1 <- ggplot(TP, aes(x = Secteur)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#1f77b4", alpha = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Observations by Sector", x = "", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
g1

# --- Age Distribution --------------------------------------------------------
g2 <- ggplot(TP, aes(x = Age)) +
  geom_histogram(fill = "#ff7f0e", bins = 20, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Company Age Distribution", x = "Age (years)", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
g2

# --- Digital Maturity Components (Mean by Sector) ----------------------------
md_vars <- c("engagementDirection", "Competences", "Automatisation",
             "AdoptionTech", "CoutsOperationnels", "InvestissementDigital")
TP_long <- TP %>%
  select(Secteur, all_of(md_vars)) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = all_of(md_vars), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Score")

g3 <- ggplot(TP_long, aes(x = Variable, y = Score, fill = Secteur)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(title = "Digital Maturity Components by Sector", x = "", y = "Score (1-5)") +
  theme_minimal() + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
                          legend.position = "bottom")
g3

# --- Financial Variables Summary ---------------------------------------------
fin_vars <- c("CA", "ROE", "ROA", "PER", "PBR", "DividendYield")
cat("\nFinancial Variables Summary:\n")
print(summary(TP[, fin_vars]))

# --- Correlation Matrix (MD components) --------------------------------------
cor_mat <- cor(TP[, md_vars], use = "complete.obs")
cat("\nCorrelation Matrix (MD components):\n")
print(round(cor_mat, 2))

cat("\nExploratory analysis complete.\n")

```
